title: ornithopus sativus subvar. macrorrhynchus
intro: Ornithopus sativus subvar. macrorrhynchus, also known as a variety of white bird's foot trefoil, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The leaves and flowers of Ornithopus sativus subvar. macrorrhynchus can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as fever and skin problems.
